name: natra-mobile
description: NATRA Employee Mobile App — Nata Terpadu Rapi Amanah

scripts.prep:www: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path www) { Remove-Item -Path www -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path www; Copy-Item index.html www/; Copy-Item pages www/ -Recurse; Copy-Item src www/ -Recurse"
scripts.cap:add:android: npm run build:css && npm run prep:www && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:css && npm run prep:www && npx cap sync

author: NATRA Team
